hooks.comment: Mirrors CI checks before every push. Blocks on failure. Bypass: SKIP_PREPUSH=1 (docs-only changes only).

hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','') or ''; root=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','.'); (sys.exit(subprocess.call(['bash', os.path.join(root,'scripts','check-no-secrets.sh')], cwd=root))) if cmd.lstrip().startswith('git commit') else None"
hooks.comment: MUST be PreToolUse — PostToolUse runs after the commit so git diff --cached is already empty.

hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or ''; msgs=[]; msgs.append('\u2192 Engine changed. Run /test-alerts before committing.') if 'src/lib/engines/' in p and p.endswith('.ts') else None; msgs.append('\u2192 Cron route changed. Verify validateCronSecret() + withErrorReporting().') if '/api/cron/' in p and p.endswith('route.ts') else None; msgs.append('\u2192 DB indexes changed. Review and deploy carefully.') if 'firestore.indexes.json' in p else None; print('\n'.join(m for m in msgs if m), file=sys.stderr) if any(msgs) else None"
hooks.comment: Context-aware reminders when touching high-risk files.

hooks.command:
python -c "
import json,sys,subprocess
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
p=(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or '')
if p.endswith('.ts') or p.endswith('.tsx'):
    subprocess.call(['node','scripts/check-no-new-any.js',p])
"
hooks.comment: any-type ratchet: fails if the edited file gained new any annotations.
Catches missing 'use client' before Vercel build failure.
Blocks turn completion if orphaned exports/files grew vs baseline.
